subcodes.first_line: Thy call hath been hearkened with the ear of acceptance, and the Tongue of Grandeur hath spoken in answer, both before and after, that which concerneth the sincere [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ندایت بسمع قبول اصغا شد و لسان عظمت بجوابت از قبل و بعد ناطق آنچه بر مخلصین
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @thankfulness; gratitude
